name: prd-taskmaster
description: AI-powered PRD generator for Claude Code with Taskmaster integration. Asks 12+ structured questions, generates comprehensive technical PRDs, runs 13 automated validation checks, and supports autonomous task execution with 4 operating modes.
scan_summary: Python-based PRD generation skill with SKILL.md, script.py automation, and install.sh. MIT licensed. install.sh uses set -euo pipefail, clones repo via git (not curl-pipe), checks for updates via GitHub API, and installs to ~/.claude/skills. script.py performs local filesystem operations only (read templates, write PRD files, validate content, run subprocess for taskmaster CLI). SKILL.md has proper frontmatter with allowed-tools list. No network calls except GitHub API for update check.

findings_summary.notes: Well-structured PRD skill with clean separation between AI judgment (SKILL.md) and mechanical operations (script.py). script.py only does local file I/O and subprocess calls to taskmaster CLI — no arbitrary code execution beyond that. install.sh is a clean git-clone installer with version checking. SKILL.md specifies allowed-tools which is a good security practice. SECURITY.md present in repo. Minor: depends on external taskmaster tool being installed. No security concerns.
